nodes.name: Google Sheets Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger on: Row Added. Sheet: Form Responses 1.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Process one form submission per loop. Loop back from Insert Structured Row to process next item.

nodes.name: Normalize and Check
nodes.notes: Add captureLocation and isShortLink. Short link → HTTP Request branch; else → ParseAndValidate.

nodes.name: Is Short Link?
nodes.notes: TRUE = short Maps link → resolve via HTTP Request. FALSE = full URL or lat,lng → ParseAndValidate.

nodes.name: Resolve Short Link
nodes.notes: GET short Maps URL; follow redirects. Response body contains coords (e.g. q=lat,lng).

nodes.name: Parse Short Link Response
nodes.notes: Extract lat,lng from response body; output same structure as ParseAndValidate.

nodes.name: ParseAndValidate
nodes.notes: Extract fields, validate arrival and location, parse lat/lng from full URL, lat,lng, or DMS.

nodes.name: Lookup Existing ClockIn
nodes.notes: Lookup ClockInSubmissions by bookingUid. Next node rejects if any row is APPROVED.

nodes.name: Reject If Already Approved
nodes.notes: If any existing row has processingStatus=APPROVED, return { skipInsert: true } so loop continues; else return parsed item with skipInsert: false.

nodes.name: Should Insert?
nodes.notes: TRUE = insert row. FALSE = already approved, skip insert (loop continues via Reject → Split In Batches).

nodes.name: Insert Structured Row
nodes.notes: Append one row to ClockInSubmissions with exact column mapping. Only runs when no APPROVED row exists for this bookingUid.
